task: Enterprise School Utilization Zone Hover and Detail Interaction

school_zone_interaction.hover_tooltip: Added pointer hover hit testing for school utilization polygons with compact tooltip showing school, level, utilization, class, year, source, and verification caveat.
school_zone_interaction.click_detail: School zone clicks now store selectedSchoolUtilizationZone in dashboard state without replacing selected parcel state.
school_zone_interaction.selected_zone_card: Right Intelligence panel shows a Selected School Zone card in Overview and Due Diligence; fullscreen map mode keeps the compact map overlay.

visual_behavior.hover_style: Hovered school zones receive a brighter outline and slightly stronger transparent fill.
visual_behavior.selected_style: Selected school zones receive thicker outline and subtle fill emphasis.
visual_behavior.labels: No always-on zone labels were added.

caveats: Presentation-derived utilization remains clearly labeled as needs verification.
Official school capacity scoring remains disabled.
No PostGIS schema or backend API changes were made.

validation.dev_cfs: passed: npm run dev:cfs; FastAPI and Next.js health checks returned 200
validation.browser_smoke: passed: http://localhost:3000 loaded with title Cabarrus FutureScape and no captured console errors

smoke_test_notes: Built-in dev:cfs endpoint checks passed for parcel, development, flood, FEMA zones, and school APIs.
Manual polygon hover/click visual verification still benefits from an in-browser user pass because selecting a 3D polygon by automation is imprecise.
